lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.KmsKeyArn.Docs: The AWS Key Management Service key required to decrypt the contents of the grammar, if any.

lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.S3BucketNa.Docs: The name of the S3 bucket that contains the grammar source.

lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.S3ObjectKe.Docs: The path to the grammar in the S3 bucket.
